sidebar.caption: Designed as a clean starter for the full inventory system.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your inventory account to continue.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.headline: See stock health at a glance.
dashboard.subtitle: Track items that need attention, monitor inventory health, and jump into actions without hunting through tables.
dashboard.summaryCopy: Use this view to scan the current state, spot risks, and keep the inventory moving.
dashboard.emptyWatchlist: No items need attention right now.

items.title: Inventory items
items.headline: Browse and manage stock records.
items.subtitle: Keep every inventory item visible, sortable, and ready to update without losing the big picture.
items.workspaceCopy: Use this page to review live stock, spot items that need attention, and move directly into editing.
items.catalogCopy: A clean list for scanning product status, category, and last update at a glance.
